title: Surveillance of cyclosporiasis (Cyclospora) - Canada.ca
content:
## Surveillance of cyclosporiasis (Cyclospora)
Learn about cyclosporiasis surveillance.
- How many cases are there of cyclosporiasis in Canada?
- How does Canada monitor cyclosporiasis?
- For more information

## How many cases are there of cyclosporiasis in Canada?
Between 2004 and 2019, an average of 238 cases of cyclosporiasis were reported annually through the Notifiable Disease Surveillance System .

## How does Canada monitor cyclosporiasis?
Cyclosporiasis is a nationally notifiable disease in all provinces and territories.
Cases are reported to:
- provincial or territorial departments of health
- the federal government, if they meet the national case definition
Canada uses different surveillance systems to monitor cases of food-borne illness.

## For more information
